pi_items.source: Task setup script downloads 1D5R.pdb from files.rcsb.org, and PDB header confirms it is the human PTEN crystal structure.
export_result.sh and verifier.py explicit file path usage.
setup_task.sh explicit file path creation and verifier.py loading.
export_result.sh and verifier.py check this exact path.
export_result.sh and verifier.py check this exact path.
verifier.py checks figure_size >= min_fig_size using this metadata value.
verifier.py checks report_lines >= min_lines using this metadata value.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on real PDB data for the human PTEN crystal structure (1D5R). Verification of the ground truth coordinates via python logic confirms the CA-CA expected distances (C124 to G129, R130, C211, D331) are ~8.52, 6.34, 35.73, and 26.87 Å respectively. All file paths and minimum output requirements in the metadata exactly match the verifier and setup scripts.
